check_item: Document has metadata header (System, Date, Author)
description: Every trade-off doc must identify the system, date, and author

check_item: Table of Contents with numbered anchors matches actual sections
description: TOC must be accurate and complete

check_item: Executive Summary has Key Finding + Bottom Line + Summary Table
description: Reader must get the full picture from section 1 alone

check_item: All options (A-G or similar) defined in Technology Options section
description: Every option must be described before scoring

check_item: Master Comparison Matrix present with star ratings
description: Scored grid comparing all options across all dimensions

check_item: Per-Dimension Detail Tables present for every scored dimension
description: Each dimension needs its own Aspect/Option/Verdict table

check_item: Risk Assessment with Risk Matrix table
description: Likelihood x Impact grid with mitigations

check_item: Implementation Complexity with effort estimates
description: Per-option effort breakdown

check_item: Recommendation section with numbered rationale
description: Clear recommendation with justification

check_item: References/Sources section with hyperlinks
description: All claims must be traceable to sources

check_item: Star ratings use consistent scale (— through ★★★★★)
description: No mixing of numeric and star scales within same document

check_item: Every dimension scored for every option (no gaps)
description: Matrix must be complete — no blank cells

check_item: Scores justified in per-dimension detail tables
description: Star rating must be explainable by the detail table

check_item: Recommendation Summary table ranks options by overall assessment
description: Reader can see ranked options at a glance

check_item: No dimension scored identically across all options
description: If all options get same score, the dimension is non-discriminating — consider removing

check_item: Options labeled consistently (A, B, C... or named) across all sections
description: Same labels in executive summary, options section, matrix, and recommendation

check_item: Each option has: description, architecture, key advantage, key risk
description: Options must be comparable — same level of detail for each

check_item: Per-dimension detail tables have Pattern/Assessment paragraph
description: Tables alone are not enough — explain the insight

check_item: Risk Matrix has: Risk, Likelihood, Impact, Options Affected, Mitigation
description: Standard risk table format

check_item: Sources cited with hyperlinks for factual claims
description: Claims about technology capabilities must link to official docs

check_item: Conflicting sources noted explicitly
description: When sources disagree, both must be cited with the conflict explained

check_item: No dimension evaluates something irrelevant to the decision
description: Every dimension should discriminate between options

check_item: Executive Summary readable without rest of document
description: Standalone value — reader gets the answer from section 1

check_item: Document flows top-down: helicopter view → detail
description: Section 1 is broadest, sections 4-5 are deepest

check_item: No duplicate content between sections
description: Matrix and detail tables should complement, not repeat

check_item: Recommendation aligns with scoring (highest-scored option or justified deviation)
description: If recommendation differs from highest score, explain why

check_item: Phased delivery approach described if applicable
description: Multi-phase rollout reduces risk for complex options

check_item: Related documents cross-referenced
description: Link to companion analyses, PRDs, research docs

check_item: Appendix section present with at least Verified Source Summary (subsection F)
description: Document must be self-contained — reader should not need external research files

check_item: Technology Deep Dives included for unfamiliar technologies in Appendix
description: Each option's technology explained at developer level with constraints and code examples

check_item: Compatibility/Support Matrix in Appendix if platform-dependent behavior
description: Verified matrix with sources when behavior varies across platforms/clients/environments

check_item: Appendix makes document self-contained — readable without external files
description: Someone receiving only this document can understand all options, scores, and claims
